title: I set an automation to move an item to another board when a status changes, but item name changes to a number when moved
excerpt: I am using the Campaigns template - when an automation moves an item to another board due to status change, the item name (or “campaign”) changes to a number. Any ideas? Thanks!

posts.author: mdefields (Michelle)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using the Campaigns template - when an automation moves an item to another board due to status change, the item name (or “campaign”) changes to a number. Any ideas? Thanks!

posts.author: mdefields (Michelle)
posts.cookedHtml: Okay, so I ended up figuring it out myself. The column was set in the automation as Item ID instead of Name.
